hero.headline: Bring your ideas
hero.subtext: 3D Printing personalised Household things, Prototypes and more. Printed with Precision, delivered with care.

products.label: What we make
products.title: Four categories, endless possibilities
products.subtitle: Every item is printed to order — custom sizes, colours and text always available.

items.title: Home & Organisation
items.description: Practical prints that make your space work smarter — designed for real life, printed to fit.

items.title: Prototypes & Parts
items.description: Need a custom bracket, replacement part or a prototype for your idea? We print it precisely.

items.title: Custom Name & Text
items.description: Personalised with any name, word or short message — perfect for gifts that actually mean something.

items.title: Gifts & Décor
items.description: Decorative prints and thoughtful gifts that stand out — unique, durable and made to order.

how.label: The process
how.title: Order in 3 simple steps
how.subtitle: No complicated forms. Just send an email and we'll handle the rest.

steps.title: Tell us what you need
steps.description: Send us an email with what you'd like — name, size, colour, quantity. Not sure? Just describe your idea.

steps.title: Get a quote & confirm
steps.description: We'll reply within 24 hours with a price, estimated time, and a preview if needed. You confirm before anything is printed.

steps.title: Receive your print
steps.description: We print it and arrange delivery. Payment by bank transfer or PayPal once you're happy with the result.

gallery.title: Recent work
gallery.subtitle: Our latest prints — add your own photos here once you have them.

order.label: Ready to order?
order.title: Let's make something
order.subtitle: Send us an email with your idea — no need to have all the details figured out. We'll help you get there.
order.sub_text: We reply within 24 hours · No upfront payment · Free quote

items.q: What materials do you print with?
items.a: Primarily PLA — durable and eco-friendly. Available in all our standard colours. We can discuss alternatives for specific functional needs.

items.q: How long does an order take?
items.a: Standard orders take 5–7 working days from confirmation. Complex or large items may take longer — we always confirm the timeline upfront.

items.q: Can I request a completely custom design?
items.a: Absolutely. Send us your idea, sketch or reference image at orders@forgelayer.online. We'll quote you within 24 hours — no obligation.
Black, White, Red, Pink, Orange, Sky Blue and Grey. Need something else? Just ask.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Browse our categories, then email orders@forgelayer.online. We reply within 24 hours.

items.q: Can I see a preview before printing?
items.a: Yes — for custom orders we send a digital render for your approval before anything is printed.

items.q: What is the maximum print size?
items.a: Up to 256 × 256 × 256 mm. Larger items can be printed in sections and joined seamlessly.
Yes, we ship throughout Germany. Shipping cost is confirmed at the time of order. Local pickup is also available.
Since all prints are custom-made, we do not accept returns unless there is a manufacturing defect. We send photos before shipping so you can approve.

items.q: How do I send you my design files?
items.a: Send STL, OBJ or 3MF files to orders@forgelayer.online. We can also design from scratch based on your description or sketch.
